div.span: hold : activated when pressed, disabled when released
toggle : toggle when pressed, keep state until pressed again (no action on release)
shiftmode manual-low-high : change shifting mode, either manual, or automatic low (focus on fuel saving) or automatic high (focus on power)
kickdown : engage first gear, launch of autodig procedure
cutoff TM : select neutral gear + activate brake

switch.text: hold : activated when pressed, disabled when released...
